nasb.text: All the best of the fresh oil and all the best of the fresh wine and of the grain, the first fruits of those which they give to the Lord, I give them to you.

esv.text: All the best of the oil and all the best of the wine and of the grain, the firstfruits of what they give to the Lord, I give to you.

cnv.text: 最好的油、最好的新酒和五穀，就是以色列人獻給耶和華的初熟的物，我都賜給你。

ccb.text: 我把以色列人献给耶和华的初熟之物——最好的新油、新酒和五谷都赐给你。
